OCR runtime notice

This directory contains Tesseract.js 7.0.0, tesseract.js-core 7.0.0,
and English/Simplified Chinese trained data distributed for Tesseract.js.

Tesseract.js and tesseract.js-core are provided under the Apache License 2.0.
The corresponding license texts are included in this directory.
The @tesseract.js-data language packages are distributed under the MIT license;
their trained data originates from the Tesseract tessdata project.

Project sources:
https://github.com/naptha/tesseract.js
https://github.com/naptha/tesseract.js-core
https://github.com/naptha/tessdata
